KNUCKLES.title: Knuckles Game
KNUCKLES.setup.title: New dice game
KNUCKLES.setup.name: Name
KNUCKLES.board.noGame: No game in progress. The GM can start one from the dice control or the Knuckles Game macro.
KNUCKLES.board.finalRound: Final round — the round will finish, then the highest score wins.
KNUCKLES.board.bust: Bust — no scoring dice. Spend a Hero Point to re-roll, or take the bust.
KNUCKLES.board.heroHint: Pick dice from the last roll to re-roll (one up to all six), then confirm to spend 1 Hero Point.
KNUCKLES.board.endConfirm: End the game now? There will be no winner and the pot is not paid out.
KNUCKLES.dice.title: Choose your dice
KNUCKLES.dice.hint: Pick a die for each of the six slots. Dice are chosen only before the game; during play only the GM can change them.
KNUCKLES.log.hero: {name} spent a Hero Point to re-roll
KNUCKLES.settings.defaultTarget.name: Default target score
KNUCKLES.settings.defaultTarget.hint: The score new games are played to by default. Can be changed per game.
KNUCKLES.settings.npcHeroPool.name: Hero Points for unlinked players
KNUCKLES.settings.npcHeroPool.hint: Hero Points granted to NPC / generic players that have no linked character. 0 disables Hero Points for them.
KNUCKLES.settings.theme.name: Board theme
KNUCKLES.settings.theme.hint: Visual theme for the game board.
KNUCKLES.settings.dieSkin.name: Dice style
KNUCKLES.settings.colorAccent.name: Accent colour
KNUCKLES.settings.colorBoard.name: Board background colour
KNUCKLES.settings.colorDie.name: Dice colour
KNUCKLES.settings.color.hint: Leave blank to use the theme default. Accepts any CSS colour, e.g. #c9a24a.
KNUCKLES.warn.needTwo: A game needs at least two players.
KNUCKLES.warn.gmOnly: Only the GM can start a game.
